body.title: Extend cluster_router with size-bucketed latency profile + safe_ceiling()
body.result: record_dispatch + safe_ceiling + p50_latency + is_overloaded + is_cold_start + capacity_observations/clear on cluster_router. Per-machine sliding window (50 obs). 5 size buckets. Success threshold 0.95. Overload mult 1.5x. Cold-start silence 5min. 15 tests. Commit 3452207d.
body.description:
cluster_router.py already tracks machine health, in-use detection, and ranked scoring. It does NOT track per-machine historical latency-by-input-size or learn a 'safe input ceiling' for each machine. Without that, distributed preparse can't route atomic chunks intelligently ('yogai7 handles ≤3 sentences, yoga9i handles ≤7' — currently unknown). Extend cluster_router with a sliding-window stats layer: per-machine, per-size-bucket, rolling N=50 observations of (input_tokens, latency_ms, outcome). Add query API: safe_ceiling(machine), p50_latency(machine, bucket), is_overloaded(machine). Per-caller view (each machine tracks its own dispatch history); gossip sync is a later follow-on.

**Affected files:** extend `wild_igor/igor/cognition/cluster_router.py` (add sliding-window state + query API); new `tests/test_cluster_router_capacity.py`. NO new DB schema — in-memory sliding window is sufficient for this ticket; persistence is a follow-on decision.
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (no storage change); no-new-memory-schemas (telemetry not memory); docs-in-code (extend existing cluster_router docstring); test-plan-or-why-not (covered); oop-first (sliding-window as a small class, or module-level dict keyed by machine — reviewer's call during build).
**Scope boundary:** IN: record(machine, input_tokens, latency_ms, outcome); safe_ceiling(machine) → int tokens; p50_latency(machine, bucket) → ms; is_overloaded(machine) → bool (load trend over last 5 obs); exponential decay on window; cold-start flag when a machine reappears after silence. OUT: routing decisions (T-preparse-router); cross-machine gossip (follow-on ticket); persistence to DB (not needed yet); chunking (T-input-chunker).
**Test plan:** record 50 runs at varying sizes; safe_ceiling reflects bucket with success_rate ≥ 0.95 in last 10 runs; p50 by bucket computed correctly; cold-start flag set when first obs after silence window; exponential decay (older obs weight less); per-machine isolation (machine A's stats don't pollute machine B's ceiling); is_overloaded triggers when last 5 p50s trend up by ≥50%.
